steps.title: Supply the clause's main verb
steps.content: The blank is the main verb in the clause "that New York City's Museum of Modern Art (MoMA) ______ a vast collection." The subject is singular, so the clause needs a finite singular verb.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is a participle, so it cannot serve as the main verb by itself. B is an infinitive. C is also an infinitive phrase. Only a finite verb completes the clause and agrees with the singular subject. The answer is D.
